approval_scope: TNBC coverage-only and quality-only 5-epoch exploratory warm-start ablations; MoNuSeg is not approved.

reference.continued_training_control: existing C0 in the approved C0/C1 screen; do not retrain or delete
reference.full_joint_arm: existing C1-full in the approved C0/C1 screen; do not retrain or delete

data.coverage: reuse the C0/C1 shared train-only coverage manifest without refresh

optimization.legacy_no_prompt_behavior: no optimizer step and no replacement crop

retention.rolling_last: one complete model/model1/optimizer/scheduler/RNG state, atomically replaced after each epoch
retention.best_pq: model/model1 weights only when development patient-macro PQ strictly improves
retention.epoch_metrics: all epochs retained as JSON/CSV and frozen diagnosis outputs
retention.expected_persistent_storage_per_arm_gib: about 9 (one full last state plus one weights-only best_pq state)
